title: lycium barbarum var. barbarum
intro: Lycium barbarum var. barbarum, also known as the Chinese wolfberry or Goji berry, is a deciduous shrub native to Asia and Europe. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Lycium barbarum var. barbarum include improved vision, enhanced immune function, and protection against oxidative stress, with the herbal preparations often taking the form of dried berries, capsules, or teas. Additionally, the plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
